module.name: shell
module.purpose: Native shell command execution tool program. shell_execute.rs defines ShellExecute, a unit-struct tool that carries NAME/DESCRIPTION/INPUT_SCHEMA/OUTPUT_SCHEMA constants and implements ToolProgram; preview() still builds a ToolPreview from the constants, and invoke() is now implemented (no longer a panic stub): it parses the JSON call via marix_common::external::serde_json (Value/from_str/json/to_string), runs {command, cwd?} through the current operating system shell (cmd /C on Windows, sh -c otherwise) via std::process::Command, and returns {exit_code, stdout, stderr} JSON, falling back to a {"error":..} JSON built by a file-local private failure helper on failure. timeout_ms is accepted in the input schema but not currently enforced. mod.rs is re-export wiring only.
